calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION Of Issues
Off Calendar Feb-10-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFFS CUCO.CO INC. AND NEMEMIAH CHU'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION Of Issues is denied. The complaint alleges that plaintiffs had the right to post all of defendant's watercolor instructional videos. The emails, which form the basis of the alleged contractual duties, do not establish as a matter of law that defendant agreed to allow plaintiffs to stream all of her videos. There are triable issues whether the February 24, 2015 emails specify which videos could be used and incorporate the terms of the January 26, 2015 (Defendant's response to UMF 2, 3, 5, 8). Prevailing party shall prepare and submit a proposed order in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/HK)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION Of Issues
Off Calendar Jan-25-2016 Continued To Feb-09-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

PLAINTIFFS CUCO.CO INC. AND NEMEMIAH CHU'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION Of Issues is
continued to February 9, 2016 at 9:30 a.m., in Dept. 302, to give Plaintiff an opportunity to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.7B. The Plaintiff must deliver courtesy copies of the opposition papers to Department 302 with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date, no later than January 25, 2016, at 4:00 pm. The court has the moving papers.

Judge: Ernest Goldsmith. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/EG)
